specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Ready Every Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, your trusted marine services partner based in Annapolis, MD. We are a full-service marine facility dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition throughout every season. From the Chesapeake Bay to the waters of South Florida, we bring specialized expertise and a genuine commitment to the boats and boaters we serve.

At Ben's Boatworks, we offer a comprehensive range of marine services built around what boat owners actually need. Our boat surveying and inspection work gives buyers, sellers, and insurers a clear, honest picture of a vessel's condition. We handle diving and underwater services for hull inspections, prop work, and anything that keeps you from having to haul out unnecessarily. Our marine AC and climate control services keep cabins comfortable in the heat, and our marine plumbing and sanitation work covers everything from through-hulls to holding tanks — done right the first time.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the greater Annapolis, MD area, working within a 60-mile radius to reach vessels wherever they are. Whether you're docked in a marina or anchored out, we understand that your boat represents a significant investment — and we treat it that way. Our goal is straightforward: show up, do the work properly, and make sure you leave with confidence in your boat's condition and systems.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call for expert marine service.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks provides thorough vessel surveys and inspections covering hull integrity, structural components, mechanical systems, and safety equipment. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey, insurance survey, or condition-and-value report, we give you an honest, detailed assessment so you know exactly what you're working with.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services allow us to inspect and address below-waterline issues without the time and expense of a haul-out. We handle hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and running gear assessments — keeping your vessel in service and your schedule intact.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: We install, service, and repair marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable through warm-weather boating seasons. From routine maintenance and refrigerant recharging to full system troubleshooting and component replacement, we work on a wide range of marine HVAC equipment to restore proper cooling and airflow.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Ben's Boatworks handles marine plumbing and sanitation work including through-hull fittings, seacocks, bilge pump systems, freshwater systems, and holding tank installation or repair. Properly functioning sanitation systems are critical for both safety and compliance, and we make sure every connection is secure and every system is working as it should.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Hull and running gear inspection via commercial diving services
Marine AC system repair and seasonal refrigerant recharge
Holding tank replacement and sanitation system overhaul
Zinc anode replacement and propeller check during underwater dive
Through-hull fitting and seacock inspection or replacement
Insurance survey and condition-and-value report for vessel owners
